models.name: ogp-mes-hub-v1
models.description: OGP MES hub for event registration

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET winding_roll = 'P1', speed_mpm = 100, meter_m = 0, last_event_label = '', machine_stop = false WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE stage_context SET is_active = true, order_no = 'DEMO-OGP-01' WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Demo stage ready"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT CASE WHEN ms.machine_stop THEN 'warn' WHEN ms.last_event_status = 'warn' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'ok' END AS status, 'Рулон на намотке' AS characteristic, ms.winding_roll AS value FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'ok', 'Скорость машины', CONCAT(ms.speed_mpm::text, ' м/мин') FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN ms.last_event_label <> '' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'ok' END, 'Событие машины', COALESCE(NULLIF(ms.last_event_label, ''), '—') FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"ms","sql":"SELECT winding_roll, speed_mpm::text AS speed_mpm, meter_m::text AS meter_m, last_event_label, CASE WHEN machine_stop THEN 'yes' ELSE 'no' END AS machine_stop FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"selectOne","var":"st","sql":"SELECT order_no, line_count_pm::text AS line_count_pm, line_count_passer::text AS line_count_passer FROM stage_context WHERE id = 1 AND is_active = true"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"eventCodes","sql":"SELECT code, name, requires_time::text AS requires_time, requires_meter::text AS requires_meter, requires_comment::text AS requires_comment, has_subcodes::text AS has_subcodes FROM event_code ORDER BY code"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"rolls","sql":"SELECT roll_id, label, is_scrap::text AS is_scrap, is_active_winding::text AS is_active_winding FROM roll WHERE stage_id = 1 ORDER BY roll_id"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"subcodes","sql":"SELECT parent_code, code, label FROM event_subcode ORDER BY parent_code, code"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"unprocessed","sql":"SELECT id::text AS id, signal_label, to_char(start_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS start_at, to_char(end_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS end_at, member_count::text AS member_count FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY start_at DESC"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","windingRoll":"${ms.winding_roll}","meterM":"${ms.meter_m}","speedMpm":"${ms.speed_mpm}","lastEventLabel":"${ms.last_event_label}","machineStop":"${ms.machine_stop}","orderNo":"${st.order_no}","lineCountPm":"${st.line_count_pm}","lineCountPasser":"${st.line_count_passer}","defaultDeleteNow":"${ms.machine_stop}","eventCodes":"${eventCodes}","rolls":"${rolls}","subcodes":"${subcodes}","unprocessed":"${unprocessed}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"when","var":"input.signalType","equals":"resume","then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET machine_stop = false, speed_mpm = 100, last_event_label = '', last_event_status = 'ok' WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Machine resumed"}}]},{"type":"when","var":"input.signalType","equals":"stop","then":[{"type":"setVar","var":"label","value":"Останов"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET machine_stop = true, last_event_label = 'Останов', last_event_status = 'warn', speed_mpm = 0 WHERE id = 1"}],"else":[{"type":"when","var":"input.signalType","equals":"knife","then":[{"type":"setVar","var":"label","value":"Удар ножа"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET last_event_label = 'Удар ножа', last_event_status = 'warn' WHERE id = 1"}],"else":[{"type":"setVar","var":"label","value":"Нажата кнопка \"Брак\" у машины"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET last_event_label = 'Нажата кнопка \"Брак\" у машины', last_event_status = 'warn' WHERE id = 1"}]}]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"nowMeter","sql":"SELECT meter_m::text AS meter_m FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1"},{"type":"selectOne","var":"merged","sql":"SELECT u.id::text AS id FROM unprocessed_event u CROSS JOIN (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT CAST(setting_value AS integer) FROM app_setting WHERE setting_key = 'downtime_group_timeout_sec'), 300) AS sec) cfg WHERE u.status = 'pending' AND u.signal_label = ? AND EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - u.end_at)) < cfg.sec ORDER BY u.end_at DESC LIMIT 1","params":["${label}"]},{"type":"when","var":"merged","notNull":true,"then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE unprocessed_event SET end_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, end_meter = CAST(? AS numeric), member_count = member_count + 1 WHERE id = ?::uuid","params":["${nowMeter.meter_m}","${merged.id}"]},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO unprocessed_member (id, unprocessed_id, signal_label, start_at, end_at) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?::uuid, ?, NOW(), NOW())","params":["${merged.id}","${label}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","merged":"yes","unprocessedId":"${merged.id}","signalLabel":"${label}"}}]},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO raw_signal (id, signal_type, signal_label, start_at, end_at, start_meter, end_meter) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' MINUTE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, GREATEST(CAST(? AS numeric) - 500, 0), CAST(? AS numeric))","params":["${input.signalType}","${label}","${nowMeter.meter_m}","${nowMeter.meter_m}"]},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO unprocessed_event (id, signal_label, start_at, end_at, start_meter, end_meter, member_count, status) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' MINUTE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, GREATEST(CAST(? AS numeric) - 500, 0), CAST(? AS numeric), 1, 'pending')","params":["${label}","${nowMeter.meter_m}","${nowMeter.meter_m}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"created","sql":"SELECT id::text AS id FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","unprocessedId":"${created.id}","signalLabel":"${label}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT id::text AS id, signal_label, to_char(start_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS start_at, to_char(end_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS end_at, member_count::text AS member_count FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY start_at DESC"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE unprocessed_event SET status = 'deleted', delete_comment = ? WHERE id = ANY(CAST(string_to_array(?, ',') AS uuid[]))","params":["${input.comment}","${input.ids}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Deleted"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"when","var":"input.step","equals":"1","then":[{"type":"when","var":"input.eventCode","equals":"","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION","error_message":"Укажите код события"}}]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":""}}]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"code","sql":"SELECT code, requires_time::text AS requires_time, requires_meter::text AS requires_meter FROM event_code WHERE code = ?","params":["${input.eventCode}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"code","message":"Unknown event code"},{"type":"when","var":"code.requires_meter","equals":"true","then":[{"type":"when","var":"input.startM","equals":"","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION","error_message":"Укажите метраж начала и конца"}}]},{"type":"when","var":"input.endM","equals":"","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION","error_message":"Укажите метраж начала и конца"}}]}]},{"type":"when","var":"input.deleteNow","equals":"false","then":[{"type":"when","var":"input.rollId","equals":"","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"VALIDATION","error_message":"Укажите рулон"}}]}]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":""}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"code","sql":"SELECT code, name FROM event_code WHERE code = ?","params":["${input.eventCode}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"code","message":"Unknown event code"},{"type":"selectOne","var":"st","sql":"SELECT id FROM stage_context WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY id LIMIT 1"},{"type":"setVar","var":"statusVal","value":"Удален"},{"type":"when","var":"input.deleteNow","equals":"false","then":[{"type":"setVar","var":"statusVal","value":"Зарегистрирован"}]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"footage","sql":"SELECT GREATEST(COALESCE(?::numeric, 0) - COALESCE(?::numeric, 0), 0)::text AS v","params":["${input.endM}","${input.startM}"]},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO process_event (id, stage_id, event_code, event_name, delete_now, roll_id, start_m, end_m, start_at, end_at, whole_stage, side, rows_json, card1, card2, comment_text, status, footage, unprocessed_id) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, ?, ?, CASE WHEN ? IN ('true','1','yes') THEN true ELSE false END, ?, CAST(? AS numeric), CAST(? AS numeric), CASE WHEN COALESCE(?, '') = '' THEN NULL ELSE (CURRENT_DATE + CAST(? AS TIME)) END, CASE WHEN COALESCE(?, '') = '' THEN NULL ELSE (CURRENT_DATE + CAST(? AS TIME)) END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('true','1') THEN true ELSE false END, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, CAST(? AS numeric), CASE WHEN COALESCE(?, '') = '' THEN NULL ELSE CAST(? AS uuid) END)","params":["${st.id}","${code.code}","${code.name}","${input.deleteNow}","${input.rollId}","${input.startM}","${input.endM}","${input.startAt}","${input.startAt}","${input.endAt}","${input.endAt}","${input.wholeStage}","${input.side}","${input.rows}","${input.card1}","${input.card2}","${input.comment}","${statusVal}","${footage.v}","${input.unprocessedId}","${input.unprocessedId}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"ev","sql":"SELECT id::text AS event_id, event_code, delete_now::text AS delete_now, roll_id, start_m::text AS start_m, end_m::text AS end_m, status FROM process_event ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1"},{"type":"when","var":"input.subcodes","notEquals":"","then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO process_event_subcode (id, event_id, subcode) SELECT gen_random_uuid(), CAST(? AS uuid), trim(x) FROM unnest(string_to_array(?, ',')) AS t(x) WHERE trim(x) <> ''","params":["${ev.event_id}","${input.subcodes}"]}]},{"type":"when","var":"ev.delete_now","equals":"true","then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO roll_map_interval (id, roll_id, map_type, start_m, end_m, event_id, event_code) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), COALESCE(NULLIF(?, ''), '0'), 'grey', ?::numeric, ?::numeric, ?::uuid, ?)","params":["${input.rollId}","${input.startM}","${input.endM}","${ev.event_id}","${ev.event_code}"]}],"else":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO roll_map_interval (id, roll_id, map_type, start_m, end_m, event_id, event_code, side, rows_json) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, 'white', ?::numeric, ?::numeric, ?::uuid, ?, ?, ?)","params":["${input.rollId}","${input.startM}","${input.endM}","${ev.event_id}","${ev.event_code}","${input.side}","${input.rows}"]}]},{"type":"when","var":"input.unprocessedId","notEquals":"","then":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE unprocessed_event SET status = 'processed' WHERE id = CAST(? AS uuid)","params":["${input.unprocessedId}"]}]},{"type":"invoke_function","objectPath":"root.platform.devices.ogp-mes-hub","functionName":"ogp_enqueue1cExport","input":{"eventId":"${ev.event_id}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","eventId":"${ev.event_id}","status":"${ev.status}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT p.id::text AS id, CONCAT(p.event_code, ' - ', p.event_name) AS event_label, to_char(p.start_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS start_time, to_char(p.end_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS end_time, p.footage::text AS footage FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE s.is_active = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC","params":["${input.orderNo}","${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"selectOne","var":"total","sql":"SELECT COALESCE(SUM(p.footage), 0)::text AS total FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE s.is_active = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?)","params":["${input.orderNo}","${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}","totalFootage":"${total.total}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"ev","sql":"SELECT event_code, event_name, roll_id, start_m::text AS start_m, end_m::text AS end_m, status, comment_text, side, rows_json, card1, card2 FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid","params":["${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"ev","message":"Event not found"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"subcodes","sql":"SELECT subcode FROM process_event_subcode WHERE event_id = ?::uuid ORDER BY subcode","params":["${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT 'Код' AS param, CONCAT(event_code, ' - ', event_name) AS value FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Рулон', COALESCE(roll_id, '') FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Начало, м', COALESCE(start_m::text, '') FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Конец, м', COALESCE(end_m::text, '') FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Статус', status FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid UNION ALL SELECT 'Комментарий', COALESCE(comment_text, '') FROM process_event WHERE id = ?::uuid","params":["${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}","${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}","subcodes":"${subcodes}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE process_event SET comment_text = COALESCE(?, comment_text), start_m = COALESCE(NULLIF(?, '')::numeric, start_m), end_m = COALESCE(NULLIF(?, '')::numeric, end_m), footage = GREATEST(COALESCE(NULLIF(?, '')::numeric, end_m) - COALESCE(NULLIF(?, '')::numeric, start_m), 0) WHERE id = ?::uuid","params":["${input.comment}","${input.startM}","${input.endM}","${input.endM}","${input.startM}","${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Updated"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT code, name, requires_time::text AS requires_time, requires_meter::text AS requires_meter, requires_comment::text AS requires_comment, has_subcodes::text AS has_subcodes, exclude_from_1c::text AS exclude_from_1c FROM event_code ORDER BY code"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO event_code (code, name, requires_time, requires_meter, requires_comment, has_subcodes, exclude_from_1c) VALUES (?, ?, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END, CASE WHEN ? IN ('1','true') THEN true ELSE false END) ON CONFLICT (code) DO UPDATE SET name = EXCLUDED.name","params":["${input.code}","${input.name}","${input.requiresTime}","${input.requiresMeter}","${input.requiresComment}","${input.hasSubcodes}","${input.excludeFrom1c}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Saved"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO event_subcode (id, parent_code, code, label) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, ?, ?)","params":["${input.parentCode}","${input.code}","${input.label}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","message":"Subcode added"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT map_type, start_m::text AS start_m, end_m::text AS end_m, event_code, side, COALESCE(rows_json, '') AS rows_json FROM roll_map_interval WHERE roll_id = ? ORDER BY start_m","params":["${input.rollId}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"st","sql":"SELECT order_no FROM stage_context WHERE is_active = true LIMIT 1"},{"type":"selectMany","var":"defects","sql":"SELECT event_code, start_m::text AS start_m, end_m::text AS end_m, side, COALESCE(rows_json, '') AS rows_json FROM roll_map_interval WHERE roll_id = ? AND map_type = 'white' ORDER BY start_m","params":["${input.rollId}"]},{"type":"setVar","var":"payload","value":"{\"rollId\":\"${input.rollId}\",\"orderNo\":\"${st.order_no}\"}"},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO roll_label_data (id, roll_id, order_no, payload_json) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?, ?, ?)","params":["${input.rollId}","${st.order_no}","${payload}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rollId":"${input.rollId}","orderNo":"${st.order_no}","defects":"${defects}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"rows","sql":"SELECT s.order_no, p.event_code, p.event_name, COUNT(*)::text AS event_count, COALESCE(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.end_at - p.start_at)) / 60), 0)::text AS downtime_min, COALESCE(SUM(p.footage), 0)::text AS total_footage FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE p.delete_now = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?) GROUP BY s.order_no, p.event_code, p.event_name ORDER BY s.order_no, p.event_code","params":["${input.orderNo}","${input.orderNo}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectOne","var":"ev","sql":"SELECT p.id::text AS event_id, p.event_code, s.order_no, p.delete_now::text AS delete_now, p.roll_id, p.start_m::text AS start_m, p.end_m::text AS end_m, to_char(p.start_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD\"T\"HH24:MI:SS') AS start_at, to_char(p.end_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD\"T\"HH24:MI:SS') AS end_at, p.footage::text AS footage, COALESCE(p.side, '') AS side, COALESCE(p.rows_json, '') AS rows_json, COALESCE(p.comment_text, '') AS comment, p.status, ec.exclude_from_1c::text AS exclude_from_1c FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id JOIN event_code ec ON ec.code = p.event_code WHERE p.id = ?::uuid","params":["${input.eventId}"]},{"type":"failIfNull","var":"ev","message":"Event not found"},{"type":"when","var":"ev.exclude_from_1c","equals":"true","then":[{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","skipped":"yes"}}]},{"type":"setVar","var":"payload","value":"{\"eventId\":\"${ev.event_id}\",\"eventCode\":\"${ev.event_code}\",\"orderNo\":\"${ev.order_no}\"}"},{"type":"exec","sql":"INSERT INTO integration_outbox (id, event_id, payload_json, status) VALUES (gen_random_uuid(), ?::uuid, ?, 'pending')","params":["${ev.event_id}","${payload}"]},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","enqueued":"yes"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"pending","sql":"SELECT id::text AS id, event_id::text AS event_id, payload_json FROM integration_outbox WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY created_at LIMIT 50"},{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE integration_outbox SET status = 'sent', exported_at = NOW() WHERE status = 'pending'"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","exported":"${pending}"}}]}

{"steps":[{"type":"exec","sql":"UPDATE machine_state SET meter_m = meter_m + speed_mpm / 60.0 * 5 WHERE id = 1 AND machine_stop = false"},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":""}}]}

bindings.query: SELECT COALESCE(CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE PRECISION), 0) AS v FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending'
SELECT winding_roll AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1
SELECT speed_mpm AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1
SELECT meter_m AS v FROM machine_state WHERE id = 1

reports.title: Необработанные события
reports.query: SELECT CAST(id AS varchar) AS id, signal_label, to_char(start_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS start_at, to_char(end_at, 'DD-MM-YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS end_at, member_count FROM unprocessed_event WHERE status = 'pending' ORDER BY start_at DESC

reports.title: Журнал процесса
reports.query: SELECT CAST(p.id AS varchar) AS id, p.event_code AS code, CONCAT(p.event_code, ' - ', p.event_name) AS event_label, to_char(p.start_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS start_time, to_char(p.end_at, 'HH24:MI:SS') AS end_time, p.start_m AS meter_from, p.end_m AS meter_to, p.footage, p.status, COALESCE(p.roll_id, '') AS roll_id, COALESCE(p.comment_text, '') AS comment FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE s.is_active = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?) ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

reports.title: Справочник кодов событий
reports.query: SELECT code, name, requires_time, requires_meter, requires_comment, has_subcodes, exclude_from_1c FROM event_code ORDER BY code

reports.title: Данные с машины
reports.query: SELECT CASE WHEN ms.machine_stop THEN 'warn' WHEN ms.last_event_status = 'warn' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'ok' END AS status, 'Рулон на намотке' AS characteristic, ms.winding_roll AS value FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'ok', 'Скорость машины', CONCAT(ms.speed_mpm::text, ' м/мин') FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1 UNION ALL SELECT CASE WHEN ms.last_event_label <> '' THEN 'warn' ELSE 'ok' END, 'Событие машины', COALESCE(NULLIF(ms.last_event_label, ''), '—') FROM machine_state ms WHERE ms.id = 1

reports.title: Подкоды событий
reports.query: SELECT parent_code, code, label FROM event_subcode ORDER BY parent_code, code

reports.title: Рулоны
reports.query: SELECT r.roll_id AS code, r.label FROM roll r JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = r.stage_id WHERE s.is_active = true ORDER BY r.roll_id

reports.title: Простои по заказу
reports.query: SELECT s.order_no, p.event_code, p.event_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count, ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (p.end_at - p.start_at)) / 60), 0)::numeric, 1) AS downtime_min, COALESCE(SUM(p.footage), 0) AS total_footage FROM process_event p JOIN stage_context s ON s.id = p.stage_id WHERE p.delete_now = true AND (? = '' OR s.order_no = ?) GROUP BY s.order_no, p.event_code, p.event_name ORDER BY s.order_no, p.event_code

reports.title: Карта рулона
reports.query: SELECT map_type, start_m, end_m, event_code, side, COALESCE(rows_json, '') AS rows_json FROM roll_map_interval WHERE roll_id = ? ORDER BY start_m

reports.title: Этикетки рулонов
reports.query: SELECT roll_id, order_no, payload_json, created_at FROM roll_label_data ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20

reports.title: Очередь 1С
reports.query: SELECT id, event_id, status, exported_at, LEFT(payload_json, 120) AS payload_preview FROM integration_outbox ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50

workflows.bpmnXml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<definitions xmlns="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL"
             xmlns:ispf="http://ispf.io/bpmn"
             targetNamespace="http://ispf.io/bpmn">
  <process id="ogp-export-1c" name="OGP 1C Export" isExecutable="true">
    <startEvent id="start"/>
    <serviceTask id="exportBatch" name="Export to 1C outbox"
                 ispf:action="invoke_function"
                 ispf:objectPath="root.platform.devices.ogp-mes-hub"
                 ispf:functionName="ogp_export1cBatch"/>
    <endEvent id="end"/>
    <sequenceFlow sourceRef="start" targetRef="exportBatch"/>
    <sequenceFlow sourceRef="exportBatch" targetRef="end"/>
  </process>
</definitions>
